view.title: Validate persona scenario #1
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the requirement for sanitizing user input.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the requirement for sanitizing user input.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where all user input is sanitized or escaped. However, the evidence provided does not include specific details or results from the simulation of this scenario, making it impossible to confirm whether the expected outcome was achieved. The lack of concrete evidence to support the validation of the scenario behavior leads to an inconclusive status.
